india_trends.title: Bitcoin slips below $76k on renewed Iran conflict fears, hawkish Fed view
Sensex, Nifty deepen losses by afternoon; auto and IT buck the trend
india_trends.summary: On the Nifty 50 gainers list, Bajaj Auto led with a rise of 3.22 per cent to ₹9,851.00 from a previous close of ₹9,543.50, supported by strong volumes of over 7.48 lakh shares

india_trends.title: Up 110% in 3 months! Multibagger defence stock MTAR Technologies share price hits record high— What’s driving the surge?
india_trends.summary: MTAR Technologies has secured orders exceeding ₹380 crore for FY26 and FY27, showcasing solid near-term visibility. Its stock surged over 9%, marking a 348% increase from its 52-week low, driven by its pivotal role in clean energy and AI infrastructure sectors.

india_trends.title: Market cap-to-GDP nears 2007 peak: expensive valuations, but not a bubble yet
india_trends.summary: India’s market cap-to-GDP ratio is nearing its 2007–08 bull run peak, raising concerns of stretched valuations. However, experts downplay these fears

india_trends.title: Multibaggers: 13 stocks surge up to 190% in a year, do you own any?
india_trends.summary: Despite a falling Sensex, several BSE 500 stocks delivered multibagger returns up to 190%. Many saw increased FII interest, highlighting strong sectoral opportunities and selective wealth creation amid broader market underperformance.

india_trends.title: Thomas Cook India forex card expands to 28 currencies
india_trends.summary: Despite the product announcement, Thomas Cook India’s stock was at ₹93.89 on NSE at midday Thursday, down 1.25% from ₹95.08

india_trends.title: Higher Oil Prices May Spur Quicker Yield Gains in Emerging Asia
india_trends.summary: Higher-for-longer oil prices threaten a faster rise in emerging Asian bond yields, if history is any guide — a risk market watchers say isn’t yet fully priced in.

india_trends.title: Adisoft Technologies share price rises 5% after strong listing on NSE. Do you own?
india_trends.summary: Adisoft Technologies share price jumped 5% after making strong listing in the Indian stock market. Here's SME IPO listing and IPO details.

india_trends.title: Sony Pictures Networks India CHRO Manu Wadhwa transitions to advisor role
india_trends.summary: Manu Wadhwa will move from Chief Human Resources Officer to Strategy Advisor at Sony Pictures Networks India starting July 1, 2026. She will advise the leadership team on key strategic priorities. The company will search for a new CHRO. Wadhwa has been instrumental in strengthening the company's peo

india_trends.summary: The sector's economic value surged, reflecting strong market demand and improved marketing efficiency across the nation.

india_trends.title: HUL bets on price hikes, cost cuts to counter Mideast-led pressures
india_trends.summary: Revenue climbed 7% to 155.99 billion rupees, supported by its mainstay home-care business - home to brands such as Comfort and Vim - whose revenue increased 9%.

india_trends.title: FPI outflows near ₹1.9 lakh crore in 2026; Can global AI stock correction turn the tide?
india_trends.summary: In 2026, foreign portfolio investors have withdrawn ₹1.89 lakh crore from Indian equities due to global uncertainties and a shift towards AI stocks in the US, South Korea, and Taiwan. This trend reflects a risk-off sentiment rather than weak domestic fundamentals.

india_trends.title: HUL is caught in a war of costs as Middle East conflict flares
india_trends.summary: Hindustan Unilever celebrated a solid profit for the March quarter, yet issued a caution regarding escalating geopolitical tensions. The ongoing conflict in Iran is predicted to influence both commodity prices and currency stability. In response, management is tightening its purse strings and adjust

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea, Suzlon, Meesho, JP Power among the most traded stocks today, 30 April 2026
india_trends.summary: Most traded stocks today: Vodafone Idea, Suzlon Energy, Meesho, Jaiprakash Power Ventures (JP Power), HFCL, Adani Power, and Vedanta were the most active stocks, or the most active stocks in terms of volume, on the NSE.

india_trends.title: Unilever India bets on price hikes, cost cuts to counter Mideast-driven pressures
india_trends.summary: Hindustan Unilever reported an 18% profit jump. The company is using cost cuts and price hikes to manage volatility from the Middle East war. Rising raw material costs are impacting consumer goods makers. Hindustan Unilever maintained its mid-term earnings forecast. The company expects better fiscal

india_trends.title: HUL shares drop over 4% despite Q4 topping Street estimates; profit jumps 21% YoY to Rs 2,464 crore
india_trends.summary: Hindustan Unilever shares fell up to 4.4% despite a strong Q4, with net profit rising 21.4% YoY to Rs 2,992 crore. Revenue grew 7.6% to Rs 16,351 crore, while EBITDA rose 3.2% to Rs 3,877 crore, improving margins to 23.7%. Home Care led segmental growth, delivering its best performance in 11 quarter

india_trends.title: US Exim Bank files insolvency petition against Reliance Power, shares dip
india_trends.summary: US Exim Bank has alleged a debt default of $165.41 million by Reliance Power’s subsidiary Samalkot Power
